artPrompt: A plump goblin mayor in a too-large sash standing stiffly under a single pool of amber lamplight, scissors poised to cut an unseen ribbon, his grin fixed and uneasy as a shadowed gangster's hand rests on his shoulder from the dark; cigar smoke curls through smoky brown gloom, the back-room menace softened into hazy melancholy, rendered as soft pastel impressionism — hazy diffuse light, visible chalky texture, gentle gradients, dreamy muted color.
name: Bought-and-Paid-For Mayor
text:
When Bought-and-Paid-For Mayor enters the battlefield, the syndicate installs its own Mayor: you become the monarch.
Whenever Bought-and-Paid-For Mayor attacks, target opponent creates a Treasure and you create a Favor token. Campaign contributions, you understand.
flavorText: He cuts every ribbon the Don tells him to cut, and smiles for the photo.
